EDELA MINI DRESS (CHOCOLATE) - CHARCOAL EXCLUSIVE

Introducing the Edela Mini Dress. This chic strapless design features a twisted front detail that adds a touch of sophistication, complemented by a flared skirt for a playful silhouette. With its bodycon fit and lining for added comfort, it's a stylish choice for any occasion.

Chocolate mini dress
Twisted front detail
Flared skirt
Bodycon fit
Strapless
Lined
Outer: 95% Polyester / 5% Elastane
Lining: 95% Polyester / 5% Elastane

HOW TO LOVE ME 

  • Wash garment inside out
  • Gentle washing cycle in cold water
  • Drip dry away from sun and do not tumble dry
  • Iron items on low heat and keep iron moving to avoid melting fibres
  • High heat can cause damage to the garment fabric

MODEL MEASUREMENTS

Model is a size AUS 8/US 4, wears an AUS 8 in this style.

Height: 169cm / 5'7in
Bust: 86cm / 34in
Waist: 66cm / 26in
Hips: 96cm / 38in

Product Title: The Paige Cami

Subtitle: A Sculpted Essential for the Modern Minimalist.

Description:

Inspired by the effortless energy of off-duty city dressing, the Paige Cami is the ultimate foundation piece for a curated wardrobe. It redefines the classic camisole, transforming an everyday basic into a sharp, structural statement through precise lines and a body-contouring silhouette.

The piece features a beautifully clean, linear square neckline that perfectly frames the collarbone, held by ultra-fine elastic straps that whisper minimalist luxury. Designed with a sleek, waist-skimming length, it hugs the torso like a second skin, offering an immaculate tuck-in or a sharp, low-rise pairing. Crafted in a premium, ultra-smooth jersey blend, Paige delivers sophisticated compression with a weightless feel—designed for the woman who demands both high-fashion form and uncompromised comfort.

DESIGN DETAILS:

  • The Silhouette: Form-fitting, second-skin silhouette with a modern, clean-cut square neckline.

  • The Straps: Delicate, high-elasticity spaghetti straps designed to sit flat and comfortably on the shoulders.

  • The Hem: Tailored waist-skimming length that pairs seamlessly with both high-waisted and low-slung bottoms.

  • The Fabric: Premium double-layered jersey blend with subtle sculpting compression and a soft, matte finish.

STYLING NOTES:

  • The Look: For a sharp, model-off-duty daytime aesthetic, pair with relaxed low-rise boyfriend denim, an oversized leather blazer, and dark sunglasses. To transition into evening, swap the denim for a fluid silk maxi skirt, pointed heels, and sculptural gold hoops.

The Amara Tiered Skirt

The Story

The embodiment of sun-drenched romance and effortless coastal escapism. The Amara Tiered Skirt captures a lighter-than-air silhouette that gracefully floats into a fluid, multi-tiered maxi length. Embracing a romantic, free-spirited aesthetic, she features a relaxed, customizable drawstring waist that gives way to beautifully voluminous tiers with a subtle crinkled texture. Striking the perfect balance between high-summer daywear and poetic luxury, she is made for slow walks on the beach and late-afternoon sun.

The Details

  • The Silhouette: An ethereal, sweeping maxi-length tiered skirt designed with a cascading three-tier architecture that generates gorgeous, dramatic movement with every step.

  • The Waistband: Features a flexible, ultra-comfortable elasticized waistband coupled with a delicate, tonal front drawstring tie for an entirely adjustable and forgiving fit.

  • The Micro-Texture: Crafted with an intricate, premium crinkle-woven finish that gives the fabric a rich, organic tactile depth while being completely travel-ready and iron-free.

  • The Fabric: Woven from an ultra-breathable, lightweight cotton-rayon blend that drapes effortlessly over the body, finished with a soft, protective inner lining for absolute confidence.

The Styling

Lean into a sublime, monochromatic coastal-luxe look by pairing this tiered maxi skirt with a crisp white structural tie-front crop top, leather slide sandals, and minimal stacked rings.

The Milan Skirt

The Story

A razor-sharp tribute to 90s runway minimalism and effortless high-street allure. The Milan Skirt strips away all excess to present a pristine, low-slung silhouette that captures an attitude of elevated rebellion. Sitting effortlessly on the hips with a flat, hardware-free finish, its micro A-line contour carves an incredibly leg-lengthening profile. Clean, dangerous, and utterly sophisticated—she is the ultimate modern separate.

The Details

  • The Silhouette: A directional low-rise micro mini skirt tailored with a subtle, structured A-line flare to maximize leg elongation.

  • The Minimalism: Engineered with a completely seamless waistline and an invisible side-zipper closure for a sleek, bulk-free front and back profile.

  • The Craftsmanship: Finished with deep, reinforced internal blind hems to ensure the skirt retains its crisp, high-end geometric shape through movement.

  • The Fabric: Cut from a premium, mid-weight technical suiting weave that resists wrinkling and offers a firm, sculpted hold.

The Styling

Create an iconic, off-duty uniform by pairing this mini skirt with the matching Signora Tank, minimalist leather mules, a chunky metal cuff, and oversized dark sunglasses.

The Signora Tank

The Story

A flawless execution of visual contrast and minimalist restraint. The Signora Tank commands sophistication with a clean, high boat-neckline that frames the collarbones with statuesque poise. Cut to a sleek cropped length, the turnaround reveals a dramatic, deeply scooped square open back that injects a sudden, high-street edge into an otherwise modest silhouette. She is refined, unexpected, and completely unbothered.

The Details

  • The Architecture: Designed with an elegant, clean-swept boat neck (sabrina neckline) and thick, structural shoulder straps that masterfully frame the upper torso.

  • The Turnaround: Features a low-cut, geometric square open-back architecture to offer an unexpected flash of skin and visual drama.

  • The Contour: Engineered in a second-skin, body-hugging cropped length that tapers perfectly at the waist to complement low or high-rise waistlines.

  • The Fabric: Sourced from an ultra-smooth, double-layered premium stretch-knit blend that provides rich compression, maximum opacity, and a luxury feel.

The Styling

Embrace the ultimate model-off-duty uniform by pairing this tank with low-slung, oversized wide-leg denim, pointed-toe black boots, a chunky metallic cuff bracelet, and dark futuristic sunglasses.

The Linear Jumpsuit

The Story

The absolute peak of model-off-duty minimalism. The Linear Jumpsuit strips away the noise to deliver a singular, statuesque profile that visually elongates the body from every angle. Tailored with a clean, high circular neckline and a completely sleeveless cut, the body-sculpting torso seamlessly gives way to a nostalgic, retro-inspired flared leg. Rendered in a deep, midnight black with endless multi-directional stretch, she is the ultimate canvas for effortless, high-street sophistication.

The Details

  • The Silhouette: An All-in-one catsuit silhouette featuring a sleek, high-neck sleeveless bodice paired with a dramatic, fluidly flared leg.

  • The Knit Texture: Engineered with continuous, precision vertical micro-ribbing that creates a powerful slimming illusion and continuous length.

  • The Contour: Carefully mapped knit tension that hugs the waist and molds securely to the low back for a sculpted hourglass effect.

  • The Fabric: Woven from an incredibly rich, high-recovery compact knit blend that offers compression-like support with an airy, breathable finish.

The Styling

Keep the editorial momentum going by pairing this jumpsuit with a sharp pointed-toe leather boot, a structured oversized blazer thrown over the shoulders, and wet-look hair.

Please Note: This garment features fully detachable draped off-the-shoulder sleeves, allowing it to transition seamlessly from an elegant off-the-shoulder blouse to a sharp, strapless corset.

The Helena Corset

The Story

A breathtaking masterclass in new-era romanticism and structural precision. The Helena Corset masterfully bridges historical opulence with a sharp, avant-garde edge. Structured with internal boning, it carves a flawless hourglass silhouette, boasting a dramatic sweetheart neckline and a razor-sharp inverted V-basque waistline. Complete with classical lace-up detailing at the back and romantic, fluidly draped off-the-shoulder sleeves, she balances high-fashion drama with minimalist power. One garment, endless dualistic allure.

The Details

  • The Architecture: Designed with heavy-duty internal structural boning, contoured cup lining, and an elongated basque hemline that cinches and visually narrows the waist.

  • The Draping: Features beautifully gathered off-the-shoulder sleeves that add a soft, romantic fluid movement around the arms.

  • The Turnaround: Outfitted with an authentic, reinforced criss-cross lace-up eyelet system at the back for a fully adjustable, body-snatching fit.

  • The Fabric: Cut from a heavy-weight, luxury satin fabric that catches the light with a subtle, liquid-like luster.

The Styling

For a high-fashion editorial look, style the black version with a structural ivory maxi skirt and strappy stilettos, keeping your hair in a sleek low bun to showcase the bare collarbones and back.

The Capri Wrap Dress

The Story

A breathtaking marriage of untamed wildness and effortless Mediterranean luxury. The Capri Wrap Dress reimagines exoticism with an artistic, blurred cheetah-leopard motif splashed across a fluid, sweeping silhouette. Fitted with delicate camisole straps and a clean V-neckline, its true piece de résistance is the integrated, asymmetric sarong-style tie draped across the midsection. This thoughtful tailoring effortlessly frames the hips while creating a beautiful, body-skimming movement. She is poetic, striking, and entirely unbothered.

The Details

  • The Silhouette: A statuesque, bias-cut maxi length dress engineered with a timeless V-neckline and ultra-fine, delicate shoulder straps.

  • The Drapery: Designed with a built-in, asymmetric wrap-front overlay that ties casually at the hip, acting as a built-in sarong to contour the waist.

  • The Motif: Features an exclusive, blurred abstract animal-spotted print that mimics the organic, soft-focused look of watercolor luxury textiles.

  • The Fabric: Woven from an ultra-lightweight, semi-sheer premium chiffon blend that flows like liquid and offers a soft, whisper-weight feel against the body.

The Styling

Leaning into a rich, off-duty heiress aesthetic, style this maxi dress with retro black tortoiseshell sunglasses, minimalist slide sandals, and gold sculptural earrings for a seamless sunset-to-dinner transition.

The Alix Top

The Story

A flawless study in high-summer texture and structural femininity. The Alix Top captures a sophisticated, sun-drenched nonchalance with its organic, tactile canvas-like weave. Cut with slim, delicate camisole straps, the bodice is precisely paneled to trace the natural contours of the body. The striking front center is anchored by an intricate multi-eyelet lace-up system that breaks into a subtle, geometric notched hemline. Turn around to reveal a completely flat, minimalist back profile that grounds the front's rebellious charm. Sophisticated, tactile, and unapologetically chic.

The Details

  • The Architecture: A structured camisole bodice tailored with vertical seam paneling and a modern, waist-slimming inverted V-notched lower hem.

  • The Focal Point: Features an adjustable front lace-up design threaded through premium, micro-gauge metallic eyelets for a customized split-front aesthetic.

  • The Turnaround: Kept sleek and clean with a low, squared flat back configuration, supported by ultra-fine adjustable shoulder straps.

  • The Fabric: Woven from a heavy-weight, luxury technical blend that perfectly mimics the raw, organic grain of premium linen while offering superior anti-wrinkle performance.

The Styling

Complete a breathtaking monochromatic look by pairing this top with the matching high-waisted pleated wide-leg trousers, finished with bare shoulders and wet-look hair.

The Monaco Dot Corset

The Story

A flawless collision of 1960s Mediterranean glamour and sharp, contemporary minimalism. The Monaco Dot Corset reimagines the timeless polka dot motif over a highly structured, ultra-clean strapless silhouette. Featuring hidden internal shaping that pinches the waist before softening into a subtle flared hem, she offers a flawlessly smooth turn-around with a completely invisible rear closure. Playful yet incredibly sophisticated, she is the ultimate catalyst for an elevated wardrobe.

The Details

  • The Silhouette: An elegant, clean-cut strapless tube profile engineered with a natural, waist-defining flare at the lower hem to sculpt a perfect hourglass shape.

  • The Architecture: Outfitted with flexible internal boning along the torso to provide structured support and a secure, slip-free lift without sacrificing comfort.

  • The Turnaround: Designed with a smooth, completely flat back entry secured by a premium, color-matched invisible zipper for a modern, hardware-free finish.

  • The Fabric: Cut from a premium, mid-weight technical woven blend featuring a high-contrast monochrome polka dot pattern with excellent structure.

The Styling

Lean into a high-street editorial aesthetic by styling this corset with wide-leg washed black denim, pointed stiletto heels, and sharp black sunglasses.
Add some shimmer to your look with our NORA crushed gold button earrings. These unique earrings feature a playful asymmetrical design and crushed gold accents for a touch of glamour.
